zh.lifeSummary: 當Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy於1185年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布拉莫盧普特時，他的父親André II de Brienne54歲，母親Adélais de Venisy42歲。他於1210年與Helisende de Rethel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1246年8月在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy于1185年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布拉莫盧普特时，他的父亲André II de Brienne54岁，母亲Adélais de Venisy42岁。他于1210年与Helisende de Rethel结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1246年8月在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年61岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Aye
meanings: North German (Schleswig-Holstein): from a short form of an ancient Germanic (Frisian) personal name with agi ‘point, edge (of a sword)’ as its first element.
Scottish: from a shortened form of the Gaelic personal name Adhamh ‘Adam’.

Burmese: from a personal name usually forming part of a compound name, from e ‘cool; calm and quiet’. — Note: Since Burmese do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Erhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ēra ‘honour’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’; name of a 7th-century saint, allegedly of Irish origin, who served as a missionary bishop in the Regensburg area of Bavaria.

en.lifeSummary: When Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy was born in 1185, in Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, André II de Brienne, was 54 and his mother, Adélais de Venisy, was 42. He married Helisende de Rethel in 1210. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in August 1246, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy est né en 1185, à Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, André II de Brienne, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Adélais de Venisy, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Helisende de Rethel en 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en août 1246, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy 1185 in Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater André II de Brienne 54 und seine Mutter Adélais de Venisy 42. Er hat 1210 Helisende de Rethel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im August 1246 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy è nato il nel 1185 nel Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, André II de Brienne, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Adélais de Venisy, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Helisende de Rethel nel 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel agosto 1246, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizyが1185年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベラムルプトで生まれた時，父André II de Brienneは54歳，母Adélais de Venisyは42歳であった。1210年にHelisende de Rethelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1246年8月にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy(이)가 1185년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 레이머업트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 André II de Brienne(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélais de Venisy(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1210년 Helisende de Rethel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1246년 8월 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy nasceu em 1185, em Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, André II de Brienne, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Adélais de Venisy, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Helisende de Rethel em 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1246, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy родился в 1185 г. в местности рамирупт, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени André II de Brienne было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Adélais de Venisy, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Helisende de Rethel в 1210 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер август 1246 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Erhard I de Brienne - Seigneur de Ramerupt et de Venizy nació en 1185, en Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, André II de Brienne, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Adélais de Venisy, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Helisende de Rethel en 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en agosto de 1246, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 61 años.
